## main

- [installation](https://github.com/koobiq/angular-components/blob/19.5.0/docs/guides/installation.en.md)
- [versioning](https://github.com/koobiq/angular-components/blob/19.5.0/docs/guides/versioning.en.md)
- [theming](https://github.com/koobiq/angular-components/blob/19.5.0/docs/guides/theming.en.md)
- [schematics](https://github.com/koobiq/angular-components/blob/19.5.0/docs/guides/schematics.en.md)
- [migration](https://github.com/koobiq/angular-components/blob/19.5.0/docs/guides/migration.en.md)
